tasks.name: BEDPM0 code
tasks.description: Implement BEDPM0 Linux distro detection and decision one-liner production changes.
acceptance_criteria: Production code implements the BEDPM0 AC set.
Linux-only scope remains intact and the required formatter and lint gates pass.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/best-effort-distro-package-manager && git pull --ff-only
Read the slice spec, contract.md, decision_register.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, and the kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress, add a START entry, and commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start-pair FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/best-effort-distro-package-manager" SLICE_ID="BEDPM0"
end_checklist: Record a targeted baseline command before edits and rerun it after edits
cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="BEDPM0-code"
Update tasks.json and session_log.md on the orchestration branch and leave the worktree in place

tasks.name: BEDPM0 test
tasks.description: Add tests that enforce BEDPM0 os-release parsing and decision one-liner invariants.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover the BEDPM0 AC set.
Test-only changes stay isolated from production code.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/best-effort-distro-package-manager && git pull --ff-only
Read the slice spec, contract.md, decision_register.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, and the kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress, add a START entry, and commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start-pair FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/best-effort-distro-package-manager" SLICE_ID="BEDPM0"
end_checklist: cargo fmt
Run the targeted tests you add or touch
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="BEDPM0-test"
Update tasks.json and session_log.md on the orchestration branch and leave the worktree in place

tasks.name: BEDPM0 integration core
tasks.description: Merge BEDPM0 code and test work and validate local integration gates before CP1.
acceptance_criteria: Local integration gates are green for BEDPM0.
The BEDPM0 core branch is ready for the CP1 checkpoint run.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/best-effort-distro-package-manager && git pull --ff-only
Read the slice spec, contract.md, decision_register.md, pre-planning/ci_checkpoint_plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, and the kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress, add a START entry, and commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/best-effort-distro-package-manager" TASK_ID="BEDPM0-integ-core"
end_checklist: Merge the code and test branches and resolve conflicts
cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
Run relevant tests
make integ-checks
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="BEDPM0-integ-core"
Update tasks.json and session_log.md on the orchestration branch and leave the worktree in place

tasks.name: CP1 CI checkpoint
tasks.description: Run compile parity and CI Testing quick for the BEDPM0 checkpoint boundary.
acceptance_criteria: Compile parity is green for the checkpoint checkout SHA.
CI Testing quick is green for the checkpoint checkout SHA.
Run ids and the checkout SHA are recorded in session_log.md.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/best-effort-distro-package-manager && git pull --ff-only
Read pre-planning/ci_checkpoint_plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, and the kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress, add a START entry, and commit docs
Run CI audit, compile parity, and CI Testing quick for the BEDPM0 core SHA
end_checklist: Record the checkout SHA, the audit output, and the run ids in session_log.md
Set status to completed, add an END entry, and commit docs

tasks.name: BEDPM0 integration linux
tasks.description: Resolve CP1 parity drift for BEDPM0 on linux.
acceptance_criteria: Linux parity issues reported by CP1 are resolved.
Local quality gates for the platform-fix worktree are green.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/best-effort-distro-package-manager && git pull --ff-only
Read the slice spec, contract.md, pre-planning/ci_checkpoint_plan.md, the CP1 results, tasks.json, session_log.md, and the kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress, add a START entry, and commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/best-effort-distro-package-manager" TASK_ID="BEDPM0-integ-linux"
end_checklist: Merge BEDPM0-integ-core into the worktree before platform fixes
cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
Run the failing platform command set again until it passes
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="BEDPM0-integ-linux"
Update tasks.json and session_log.md on the orchestration branch and leave the worktree in place

tasks.name: Feature cleanup
tasks.description: Remove retained triad worktrees after all slice integrations finish.
acceptance_criteria: All triad tasks are completed and merged as intended.
Cleanup records the script summary in session_log.md.
start_checklist: git checkout feat/best-effort-distro-package-manager && git pull --ff-only
Confirm all tasks are completed and merged as intended
Set status to in_progress, add a START entry, and commit docs
end_checklist: Run: make triad-feature-cleanup FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/best-effort-distro-package-manager" DRY_RUN=1 REMOVE_WORKTREES=1 PRUNE_LOCAL=1
Then run: make triad-feature-cleanup FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/packs/draft/best-effort-distro-package-manager" REMOVE_WORKTREES=1 PRUNE_LOCAL=1
Set status to completed, add an END entry with the cleanup summary, and commit docs
